name: murray foster
cooked: as far as i’m aware each company’s devices share zero commonalities with each other (other than being embedded systems that are meant to play kanye stems). it would be a total port of the software to another platform with a completely different set of peripherals and circuit configurations–akin to rewriting the te stem player firmware from scratch using the kano player’s functionality as a high-level design document.
raw: as far as i'm aware each company's devices share zero commonalities with each other (other than being embedded systems that are meant to play kanye stems). it would be a total port of the software to another platform with a completely different set of peripherals and circuit configurations--akin to rewriting the te stem player firmware from scratch using the kano player's functionality as a high-level design document.
